meaning: n.霑勛壩謾ｾ郤ｵ,霑勛壩莉ｻ諤ｧ
examples: The overindulgence of food and drinks clogs body and mind.
Overindulgence could lead to problems with digestion.
Extra money woes coupled with an already stressful holiday season can also be a setup for overindulgence.
Psychologists are warning about the detrimental effects of such overindulgence, but their cries are falling largely on deaf ears.
